blocks.description: Everything dumped into a flat structure with no organization. As the project grows, this becomes impossible to navigate.
blocks.code:
src/
  App.tsx
  Header.tsx
  Footer.tsx
  Login.tsx
  LoginForm.tsx
  Dashboard.tsx
  DashboardChart.tsx
  DashboardTable.tsx
  UserProfile.tsx
  UserSettings.tsx
  api.ts
  helpers.ts
  utils.ts
  types.ts
  constants.ts
  styles.css
  more-styles.css
  dashboard-styles.css
  formatDate.ts
  formatCurrency.ts
  useAuth.ts
  useApi.ts
  Button.tsx
  Modal.tsx
  Table.tsx
  ... 200 more files

blocks.description: Organized by feature with shared components separated. Any developer can find what they need in seconds.
blocks.code:
src/
  components/          # Shared, reusable UI components
    ui/
      Button.tsx
      Modal.tsx
      Table.tsx
    layout/
      Header.tsx
      Footer.tsx
      Sidebar.tsx
  features/            # Feature-specific code grouped together
    auth/
      LoginPage.tsx
      LoginForm.tsx
      useAuth.ts
      auth.api.ts
      auth.types.ts
    dashboard/
      DashboardPage.tsx
      DashboardChart.tsx
      DashboardTable.tsx
      dashboard.api.ts
    user/
      UserProfile.tsx
      UserSettings.tsx
      user.api.ts
      user.types.ts
  hooks/               # Shared custom hooks
    useApi.ts
    useDebounce.ts
  utils/               # Pure utility functions
    formatDate.ts
    formatCurrency.ts
  config/              # App-wide configuration
    constants.ts
    routes.ts
